## Classes

<a id="zanna-core-box"></a>
### `Zanna.Core.Box`

Provides Box functionality for core runtime services.

`Zanna.Core.Box` exposes a registry-backed runtime surface without requiring callers to
construct the class directly. Its public surface exposes operations including `I64`, `F64`,
`I1`, `Str`.

<a id="zanna-core-messagebus"></a>
### `Zanna.Core.MessageBus`

Provides pub/sub message bus.

Create `Zanna.Core.MessageBus` values through its registered constructor and use the returned
object with the instance members below. Its public surface exposes properties such as
`TotalSubscriptions` and operations including `Callback`, `Clear`, `ClearTopic`, `Publish`.
